Summary: Interest rate calculation incorrect for variable rate mortgages
Description: The system computes the monthly instalment using a fixed rate formula even when the product is configured as variable rate. Affects all variable rate mortgage products.
Resolution: Fixed the rate type selector in the calculation engine. The formula now correctly reads the product configuration flag before applying the rate.

Summary: Oracle GL sync fails on multi-currency transactions
Description: When a transaction involves more than one currency the Oracle GL integration throws a null pointer exception. The transaction is rolled back but no error is shown to the user.
Resolution: Under investigation. Temporary workaround: process single-currency transactions only.

Summary: AOO session timeout does not redirect to login page
Description: After the session expires the user receives a generic 401 error instead of being redirected to the login page with a meaningful message.
Resolution: Added session expiry interceptor in AOO frontend. User is now redirected to login with a message.

Summary: ESI mandatory field validation missing on customer onboarding
Description: The fiscal code field is not validated as mandatory on the ESI customer onboarding form. Users can submit the form without entering it.
Resolution: Added required validator to fiscal code field. Backend also now returns 400 if field is missing.

Summary: KFC credit limit check bypassed for existing customers
Description: Existing customers with expired credit assessments can still proceed with new loan applications without triggering a new credit check.
Resolution: Root cause identified: the credit check flag is cached and not invalidated on assessment expiry. Fix in progress.

Summary: PDF statement generation fails for accounts with >500 transactions
Description: Generating a PDF account statement for accounts with more than 500 transactions results in a memory overflow error and the PDF is not produced.
Resolution: Implemented pagination in the PDF generation service. Statements are now generated in chunks of 200 transactions.

Summary: Oracle Accounts Payable duplicate payment not detected
Description: The system allows a second payment to be submitted for an invoice that has already been paid in Oracle AP. The duplicate detection logic only checks within the current day.
Resolution: Duplicate check now queries Oracle AP for all historical payments against the invoice. Pending deployment.

Summary: ESI document upload rejects valid PDF files over 5MB
Description: The ESI document upload component rejects PDF files larger than 5MB even though the documented limit is 20MB. The error message says file is invalid rather than too large.
Resolution: Increased the file size limit in the ESI upload service configuration from 5MB to 20MB.

Summary: KFC loan disbursement date not saved correctly
Description: The loan disbursement date is saved in UTC but displayed in local time without conversion. For operations after 23:00 local time the displayed date is one day ahead.
Resolution: Added timezone conversion in the date display component.

Summary: AOO notification email not sent on account block
Description: When a customer account is blocked the system should send a notification email but the email is not triggered. The block operation completes successfully.
Resolution: Added event listener for account block event that triggers the notification service.

Summary: ESI interest accrual calculation wrong for leap year
Description: Interest accrual for savings accounts uses 365 days in the denominator even in leap years. This causes a small but systematic undercalculation of interest in 2024.
Resolution: Fix requires update to the accrual formula. Currently under review by the finance team.

Summary: Oracle HR payroll export missing employees hired in December
Description: Employees hired in December are excluded from the monthly payroll export due to an off-by-one error in the hire date filter.
Resolution: Fixed the date range filter to use hire_date <= last_day_of_month instead of < first_day_of_next_month.

Summary: KFC collateral valuation not updated on property revaluation
Description: When a property is revalued in the collateral management module the loan-to-value ratio is not recalculated automatically. The old LTV is used for risk reporting.
Resolution: Workflow trigger for LTV recalculation on revaluation event is missing. Fix in development.

Summary: AOO bulk payment file import silently drops duplicate transactions
Description: When importing a bulk payment file the system silently skips duplicate transactions without logging them or notifying the operator. Operators have no way to detect the skipped transactions.
Resolution: Added a warnings section to the import result that lists all skipped duplicates with reasons.

Summary: ESI customer search returns results from other branches
Description: The customer search in ESI does not filter by branch code. A branch operator can see and access customer records from all other branches.
Resolution: Added branch_code filter to the customer search query. Branch operators now only see their own customers.

Summary: KFC amortisation schedule shows negative principal after restructuring
Description: After a loan restructuring operation the amortisation schedule can show negative principal values in some instalments depending on the new repayment terms.
Resolution: Root cause is in the restructuring algorithm that does not recalculate the residual principal correctly. Under analysis.

Summary: Oracle purchasing order approval stuck in pending status
Description: Purchase orders above a certain threshold get stuck in pending approval status because the approval workflow is not triggered for orders created via API.
Resolution: Fixed the API order creation endpoint to trigger the approval workflow engine after saving.

Summary: AOO two-factor authentication code not sent to international numbers
Description: SMS two-factor authentication codes are not delivered to international mobile numbers (non-Italian prefix). Domestic numbers work correctly.
Resolution: Updated the SMS gateway configuration to allow international prefixes. Tested with +44 and +49 numbers.

Summary: ESI risk score display rounded incorrectly
Description: The customer risk score is displayed rounded to the nearest integer but should show one decimal place according to the specification.
Resolution: Changed the number formatting in the risk score display component to use toFixed(1).

Summary: KFC standing order cancelled when loan account is modified
Description: Modifying any attribute of a loan account (e.g. contact details) triggers a cascade that cancels all standing orders associated with that account.
Resolution: Fixed the cascade trigger to only cancel standing orders when the account is closed or restructured.

Summary: Oracle General Ledger balance not updated in real time
Description: Oracle GL balances are updated only in batch mode at end of day. Intraday queries return stale data which causes incorrect liquidity reports during the day.
Resolution: Architectural issue requiring Oracle GL configuration change. Business workaround in place.

Summary: AOO SEPA direct debit mandate not validated against IBAN
Description: The SEPA direct debit mandate form accepts IBANs that do not pass the MOD97 checksum validation. Invalid IBANs are only detected at execution time causing payment failures.
Resolution: Added IBAN MOD97 validation on the mandate registration form.

Summary: ESI AML alert false positive rate too high for low-risk customers
Description: The AML monitoring engine is generating a high rate of false positive alerts for customers classified as low-risk. This is causing significant manual review workload.
Resolution: Threshold calibration review in progress with compliance team.

Summary: KFC fee calculation missing for partial early repayment
Description: Partial early repayment of a loan does not trigger the early repayment fee calculation. Full early repayment works correctly.
Resolution: Fee calculation logic only handles the full repayment case. Partial repayment path is missing the fee trigger.

Summary: AOO report export to Excel truncates text fields over 32767 characters
Description: When exporting reports to Excel any text field containing more than 32767 characters (Excel cell limit) causes the export to fail with an unhandled exception.
Resolution: Added truncation at 32767 characters for text fields during Excel export with a note in the cell.
